config.rationale: Experiment 3/30 — establishing the vLLM baseline for Qwen3.5-9B (a VLM with has_mtp=true) on a single H100 80GB. The user wants to quantify the gain from --language-model-only on vLLM, which requires a clean reference run first WITHOUT that flag so the next experiment can isolate the LM-only delta (skipping vision tower load + multimodal preprocessing path). Per Rule 1 (baselines), I use defaults: no quantization, no speculative decoding, kv_cache_dtype=auto, scheduling_policy=fcfs, no chunked prefill, no prefix caching, enforce_eager=false (CUDA graphs on for fair throughput numbers). I deliberately mirror the successful SGLang baseline (4eb71ad47b0b) settings: TP=1, max_model_len=65536, dtype=auto — this enables a direct cross-engine comparison (SGLang baseline hit 7156 tok/s, TTFT p95 155.8 ms). Sizing: ~7.46B params ≈ 15 GB in bf16 + vision tower (a few GB) leaves >55 GB for KV cache at gpu_memory_utilization=0.9 — comfortable for 65k context, no OOM risk. Avoiding the previous SGLang failure modes (NEXTN + speculative-v2 env crashed init) by staying with vanilla vLLM. Next experiment will flip --language-model-only via extra_engine_args to measure the VLM-skip speedup the user asked for; the run after that can layer in chunked_prefill + prefix_caching, then optionally fp8 KV / fp8 weights for the explore goal.

smoke_tests.json_mode_detail: No content in response (reasoning model may not support JSON mode)

llm_commentary: The vLLM baseline for Qwen3.5-9B established a strong reference: 7098.5 tok/s throughput and 45.6ms TTFT p95, dramatically beating the SGLang baseline's 155.8ms TTFT while landing within ~1% of its throughput (7156 tok/s). As the only vLLM data point so far, it claims all three leaderboard tops and the sole Pareto point. Smoke tests are healthy except JSON mode (expected for reasoning/VLM models), so the run is a clean foundation for the planned --language-model-only ablation.
docker_command: docker run --name bench-vllm-8e036532f8f1 --gpus all --shm-size 16g --network host -v /root/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface -d vllm/vllm-openai:latest --model Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --tensor-parallel-size 1 --dtype auto --gpu-memory-utilization 0.9 --max-model-len 65536 --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser qwen3_coder --reasoning-parser qwen3
